description_long: This object is a modern, circular ashtray with a wide, open central cavity and a thick, robust rim. The exterior is smooth and slightly curved, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. The inner surface is recessed, forming a deep bowl to contain ash and cigarette butts, while the outer rim appears solid and sturdy. The material looks like a dark, matte or semi-glossy plastic or composite, possibly with some metallic reinforcement for durability. There are no visible decorative elements, signage, or branding, emphasizing a minimalist, utilitarian design. The object is compact and portable, likely intended for placement on flat surfaces such as tables or ledges.
description: A sleek, circular ashtray with a deep central cavity and a thick, smooth rim, made from dark, durable material. Its minimalist design is ideal for urban settings and easy placement on flat surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved exterior and the deep, open cavity of the ashtray.
description_view_1: Angled top view highlights the thickness of the rim and the smooth, continuous surface.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the full circular opening and the recessed bowl interior.
description_view_3: Angled rear view displays the open back and the consistent curvature of the rim.
